channel.title: LLM Timeline — Fudan University Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Fudan University.

item.title: AnyGPT (Fudan University)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Llama 2 7B backbone with new matrices ('reshaping the embedding matrix and prediction layer')

item.title: MOSS (Fudan University)
item.description: Parameters: 16B License: open Type: model Major bandwidth issues: https://www.reuters.com/technology/china-fudan-university-team-apologises-after-chatgpt-style-platform-crashes-2023-02-21/
